description_long: This office building features a low, rectangular structure with a flat, ribbed roof and a broad, stepped base. The exterior is dominated by dark, horizontal lines, likely representing window bands or facade treatments, and the building sits atop a wide, sloped plinth that gives it a monumental appearance. The front facade includes a series of evenly spaced, horizontal elements that may serve as sunshades or decorative louvers. The building's base is slightly recessed, creating a shadowed effect and emphasizing the upper mass. The overall design is geometric and minimalist, with little ornamentation and a focus on strong, clean lines. The color palette is primarily dark gray and black, with some reddish-brown accents visible on the front.
description: A low, rectangular office building with a ribbed flat roof, dark horizontal facade elements, and a broad, sloped base. The design is minimalist and geometric, with dark gray and black tones accented by reddish-brown details.
description_view_0: Front view showing the stepped base, ribbed roof, and reddish-brown horizontal accents on the facade.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the ribbed roof and the continuous dark facade, with less visibility of the reddish-brown accents.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the uniform, ribbed roof and the broad, sloped base with minimal facade detail.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the ribbed roof and a glimpse of the reddish-brown accents, with the sloped base visible.
attribute_window_pattern: Regular horizontal bands, evenly spaced across the facade, with a ribbed or louvered appearance.
